request.description:
Update a tenant user.

**Request body validation (supported fields):**
- `name`: sometimes|string|max:255
- `email`: sometimes|email|max:255
- `type_id`: sometimes|nullable|string|exists:types.id where module_type=`users`

**Note:**
- Proposal/resource defaults are no longer stored on users directly. Use `type.resource_type_profile` instead.
